title: Marble Run Architect
description: Build a physics marble run with ramps, loops, bumpers and flippers, then race marbles for the best time.
concept: A grid-based construction toy: place ramps, loop-the-loops, funnels, pinball bumpers, tap-to-flick flippers, spawners and a goal onto a 12x16 board. Hit Run to drop marbles under real circle-vs-segment physics with gravity, restitution and friction, race against your best completion time, and tune the material (steel, glass, rubber) for different weight and bounce.
features: 8-piece build palette with tap-to-rotate ramps and flippers
Real-time physics: gravity, collision, restitution, friction, pinball bumpers, loop-the-loop, tap-to-flick flippers
3 marble materials (steel/glass/rubber) with distinct mass, bounce and color
Synthesized collision clacks and a goal chime via Web Audio
Best-completion-time tracking per track layout via localStorage
Save/Load JSON, shareable URL-hash tracks, and one-click PNG screenshot export

interaction.mouse: Pick a piece from the palette, click the grid to place it; click a placed ramp/flipper again to flip its orientation
interaction.click: In Run mode, click a flipper on the track to flick it like a pinball paddle
interaction.touch: Same as mouse via touch — tap palette, tap grid, tap flippers during Run
interaction.keyboard: Space toggles Run/Build, Backspace clears the track while in Build mode
